There is also the fact that Ramona is usually our investigation partner in side stories so there's more moments where they can bounce off each other. I feel that's kind of what William needed because in arc 1 he usually goes off on his own and everyone just accepts that because he's good at the job
I had a similar feeling with Ryker where with just main story context it's not clear how close he is to Keeper, enough to call them his Watson, but his side story helps make it clearer
